steps.t: The stone table where you should pour Mugwort's gruel is at the end of a southward path near a signpost on the road through Nain Enidh. Old Mugwort as…
Old Mugwort is at the camp on the east side of Minas Eriol. After drawing Shadepaw's pack into the open, you defeated the Warg-leader. Old Mugwort wil…
